---
description: Triage CI failures on a PR — bucket by type (lint/doc-links/test/compose/other) and propose a minimal fix command for each bucket.
---
<!-- Generated by scripts/agents_init.py from agents.yml — do not edit directly. Edit the source under agents/sources/ and re-run `make agents-init`. -->

Invoke as: `/triage <pr-number>`

If no PR number is given, ask for it before proceeding.

Follow the `triage` skill to fetch checks, bucket failures, and emit the narrowest fix command per bucket.
